analysis_conclusion: GPT OSS, Mistral, Qwen, and GLM returned status=ok and schema_valid=true; Gemini remained visible as non-valid provider run(s).
The canonical graph produced 0 primary candidate, 7 validation target(s), and 2 monitor-only item(s).
7 validation targets remain for human review.
log_observations: The run used all 8,011 sanitized stream_v3_runtime rows from 2026-06-26T03:31:23Z to 2026-06-26T17:38:45Z.
The local-first Evidence Bundle retained 654 grouped evidence items and 7 deterministic signals.
The provider prompt used 140 selected evidence items covering 7,383 occurrences (92.2% of the sanitized corpus).

Dell runtime analysis used Kubernetes pod/deploy output, systemd journal snippets, ffmpeg TCP send samples, WAN/netlink observers, persistent TCP anchor observations, and runtime state snapshots represented by evidence IDs and counts.
OAuth token-state fragments were excluded or redacted before API analysis; raw credential material was not uploaded.
analysis_context.model_projection_policy: AI input used a bounded Evidence Bundle projection: top 140 high-signal evidence items; row-level raw logs stayed out of provider prompts.
source_observations: Sanitized source context was attached with source_context_sha256=669dc2f9d33ff9ab9d73f04d8c17f8718386815d0c6e536dde14b627232637d2.
Source context is interpretation context only; runtime support still has to cite Evidence Item IDs from the sanitized corpus.

items.detail: Requested providers are recorded with status, schema validation, hashes, and retry metadata; only schema-valid outputs contribute review support.
items.label: Real provider run

items.detail: Raw logs and raw source stayed local; only sanitized bundles and context reached the API.
items.label: Source-first boundary

items.detail: 7,383 occurrences were represented by selected evidence IDs and counts.
items.label: Token compression

items.detail: Provider convergence creates review targets, not automatic causal truth.
items.label: Human gate

devops_loop.summary: The public URL is backed by a recorded e2e API run, provider hashes, schema validation, and read-only precomputed serving.
devops_loop.title: AI workflow is operated as production software

generation.score_definition: claimed successful providers / all successful providers

review_graph_summary.note: Provider convergence is technical support only; causal and impact judgement remains human-gated.
review_graph_summary.score_definition: Convergence score = claimed successful providers / all successful providers. Silent providers count against convergence.
review_graph_summary.summary: The e2e API analyzed a 8,011-row sanitized log corpus with 4 schema-valid real provider output(s); 5 review unit(s) had at least two provider positions while impact remains human-gated.

finding.impact: GPT OSS, Mistral, Qwen, and GLM returned schema-valid outputs; Gemini did not contribute schema-valid support. 0 primary candidate and 7 validation target(s) remain human-gated; incident baseline is not auto-accepted.
finding.title: 4/5 real providers produced schema-valid output for the 8,011-row stream_v3_runtime corpus
